jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Wrogn
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Wrogn! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Wrogn:
Wrogn is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wrogn!
